archimate:BusinessService.name: Data Quality
archimate:BusinessService.documentation:
Definition: Data Quality ABB is a Business Service that enables the implementation of an organization's data quality management capabilities, provisioned via a data quality service delivery mode by, or on behalf of an organization. A Data Quality Business Service comprises any data quality service exposed to ensure the accuracy, completeness, reliability, and timeliness of data within the organization.
Source: EIRA Team
LOST view: OV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DataQualityBusinessService
ABB name: egovera:DataQualityBusinessService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DataQualityBusinessService
Name: eNotification Digital Public Service
Interoperability Layer: Organisational
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalPublicBusinessService

properties.value: Data Quality ABB is a Business Service that enables the implementation of an organization's data quality management capabilities, provisioned via a data quality service delivery mode by, or on behalf of an organization. A Data Quality Business Service comprises any data quality service exposed to ensure the accuracy, completeness, reliability, and timeliness of data within the organization.
